response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and current Staff-level role at Stripe touching AI-agent infrastructure. However, the resume shows no explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or statistical analysis at the scale this Principal/IC6 growth role requires. Title is Senior/Staff rather than Principal, and there's no demonstrated track record of building measurement platforms used across multiple teams or leading multi-workstream growth initiatives.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background with high-scale, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Current Staff-level role at Stripe with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring via workshops/talks
concerns: No explicit experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or growth platform experience listed
Lacks evidence of Principal/IC6-level scope: cross-team architecture leadership, multi-workstream initiatives
Limited demonstrated data/statistical analysis aptitude required for experimentation quality and bias detection
